# int

Converts a value to an integer. Does not work on strings - use `parse_int` for string parsing.

```rad
int(_var: any) -> int|error
```

```rad
int(3.14)     // -> 3
int(true)     // -> 1
int(false)    // -> 0
int("42")     // -> Error: cannot convert string
```
